blockers.detail: Keep X/Brave logged in for scraper to work — losing ~30% of alpha per cycle without it. Currently hitting 30s timeout on high-signal accounts.
Check .env PRODUCTHUNT_API_KEY or re-authenticate. Workaround: ProductHunt findings are lower priority (covered by Twitter + Reddit signal)

top_findings.title: 5 blue ocean psychology apps: Creative/Flow/Polymath/Innovation/Musical Genius. Psychology beats religion for competition + margins. Finch validation (5.0*, 652K ratings).
top_findings.action: Build 5 concepts, QA 1, submit to factory pipeline

top_findings.title: 17 live freelance leads from Reddit (magazine layout $500-1K, shorts editor $200, social manager $100). Same-day execution window (4-24 hours). Estimated capture $2,700 if all convert.
top_findings.action: Email all 17 with qualification + custom offer within 90 minutes

top_findings.title: Algorithm changes: TikTok completion rate raised, YouTube Shorts SEO-enabled (50-60s sweet spot), Instagram DM shares = priority metric. First 5 seconds = distribution window.
top_findings.action: Update posting calendar + template tweaks (native-first strategy)

top_findings.title: Step 1 email = 58% of replies. Intent-based timing = 2-4x reply rate multiplier. Engagement depth > open rates (2026 shift). Tracking pixels trigger Gmail warnings.
top_findings.action: Integrate timing + first-email quality focus into next cold batch

notes: Reddit scraper signal rate = 11% (158 posts, 18 actionable). Twitter scraper is higher quality but hitting timeout. Blue ocean psychology apps are highest ROI finding this cycle. Freelance leads are hot (same-day capture window). ProductHunt blocker remains, ProductHunt findings lower priority.
